reviews.review_description:
This game has a physics engine very similar to gorrila tag. I enjoy this type of movement as it allowed me to use my arms more efficiently. The simple design of the marshmallow is not only cute but very practical as there are not button controls to far around with! Over 10/10 ga e so far!







Please kiss me skill

developer_response.body: I am glad you had a good experience! A lot is being added in the future!
It does indeed, Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Great Game! Amazing owner and staff, well developed game, props to the owner! Download it, seriously, its a really good game

developer_response.body: Wow! Thank you for the kind words! More coming soon!👀

reviews.review_description: Ok I love this game it actually really fun but there's not much of a community I would appreciate if you read this but if I could be a mod I would love that and can I can't join the discord sever sadly but if you want a whole look out on me my tictok is: duckyvr_4000

developer_response.body: Awesome that you had a good experience! Unfortunately we cannot hand out Moderator for strict reasons. Have a good day!

reviews.review_title: I have no idea what happen to marsh run
reviews.review_description: the game is laggy just fix it

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry for the unexpected experience you had on Marsh Run. V2 has released and now is in full development for optimizations on performance and overall fidelity! I have pushed out patches to also fix performance so please let me know if you still experience these issues.
